data.content:
Looking at the current implementation more carefully, I notice that the swap functionality is already fully implemented in the settings-pools-section.tsx file. The UI includes:

1. Two Select components for choosing "current agent" and "replacement agent"
2. A Swap button that calls the swapPoolAgent function
3. Validation logic to prevent invalid swaps
4. Error handling with toast notifications

The swapPoolAgent function in agent-pool.ts is also implemented and has comprehensive test coverage in agent-pool.test.ts.

Since the task description says "Add left/right agent selectors and swap action in settings dispatch pools screen" and this functionality is already present, it appears this task may have already been completed in a previous implementation.

Let me check if there are any issues or edge cases that need to be addressed, or if the implementation needs any improvements.
